expectations.text: Uses Pydantic at the pipeline entry point and for external API responses
expectations.evidence: Uses frozen dataclasses throughout. No Pydantic validation at any boundary — CSV parsing uses manual _parse_row with no schema validation, API response consumed as raw dict.

expectations.text: Uses dataclass or plain objects for internal flow, OR explains the tradeoff
expectations.evidence: Uses frozen dataclasses everywhere — consistent but misses the boundary validation opportunity

expectations.text: Does NOT add Pydantic validation at every internal handoff
expectations.evidence: No Pydantic at all, so no over-validation. But also no validation at boundaries where it's needed.
